name: Veal Farsu Magru
recipeIngredient: 1/2 breast of veal, boneless, partially defatted
1 pound beet greens or Swiss chard, cut into 1-inch ribbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Have the butcher remove the bone from the veal breast and butterfly open.
3. In a 12- to 14-inch sauté pan, heat 2 tablespoons virgin olive oil until smoking.
4. Add beet greens and cook until wilted but not fully cooked, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
5. Add grated cheese, sundried tomatoes, and eggs. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Place the mixture on the inside of the veal pocket and roll the veal up like a jellyroll. Tie securely with butcher twine.
7. In an oven-ready thick-bottomed casserole, heat remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil until smoking.
8. Add veal breast and brown all sides, turning frequently, about 10 minutes.
9. Drain oil from pan, add white wine and tomato sauce, and bring to boil.
10. Cover pan with lid or foil and place in oven. Cook for 1-1/2 hours or until fork tender.
11. Remove from oven and allow to stand 10 minutes before carving. Serve.
Yield: 4 servings
